item.title: INFRA: File Coordination Layer
item.intent: iOS file access is sandboxed and complex — security-scoped URLs, file coordination, and bookmarking must be rock-solid or users lose access to their files.
item.description: Foundation for all file operations. Security-scoped URL handling: obtain, persist, and resolve bookmarks so files remain accessible across app launches (required for recents). NSFileCoordinator integration for safe reads/writes that respect other processes (iCloud, Dropbox, Git). NSFilePresenter for detecting external file changes (D-FILE-5). UTF-8 encoding validation (D-FILE-2). Line ending detection and preservation (D-FILE-3). File size check and warning (D-FILE-4).
acceptanceCriteria: Security-scoped URL bookmark persists across app launches — file reopens without re-picking
File coordination prevents data corruption when iCloud syncs during a write
External file change triggers a notification to the editor (reload/keep choice)
Non-UTF-8 file detected and error shown without crash or corruption
File with CRLF line endings preserved on save (not converted to LF)
File >1MB triggers dismissable warning before opening
